about.title: About me
about.p1_2: , a Software Engineer with a focus on
about.p1_5: . I graduated with Highest Honors from Universidad de Tarapacá, where I also worked as a teaching assistant for various courses.
about.p2_1: I was recently selected as one of the scholars for the
about.p2_2: program, and I am currently pursuing certifications in
about.p2_4: to expand my horizons. In parallel, I am exploring the use of AI in applications with
about.p3: Outside of coding: I read, play guitar (electric, of course), work out, ride my bike around the city, and occasionally dive into computational geometry problems. In fact, my thesis was about that.
funFacts: I had 9 cats when I was little. Now I'm allergic to them.
I studied psychology for a year and a half before switching to computer science.
I'm not a fan of math, but my thesis was pure hard math.
Self-proclaimed best Age of Mythology player in Iquique.
With the exception of pizza, I don't really like Italian food.
I think I would be a good singer.
I can play Ka$cade by Animals as Leaders at 80% speed.

experience.title: Experience & Education
experience.subtitle: What I've been up to lately

items.title: Software Engineer
description: Technical leadership in the full lifecycle of a booking management PWA.
Efficient implementation with GraalVM (<100MB RAM, startup in ms), embedded SQLite, and Flyway migrations.
Low-cost deployment on AWS EC2 and Cloudflare Pages, with Nginx security (SSL, Rate Limiting).
Zero Downtime from launch to production.

items.title: Trainee Developer and Analyst
description: Design and implementation of a solution to mitigate critical security vulnerabilities in Spring Boot & Vue microservices.
Resolution of technical debt in SonarQube and implementation of test automation with >93% coverage.
Preparation and execution of QA plans for newly implemented features.
End-to-end management of agile requirements: stakeholder gathering, BPMN modeling, and leadership in technical and business refinements.

items.title: Backup Administrative Support
description: Responsible for ensuring operational continuity by managing corporate backup platforms (Veeam, Data Protector, NetVault, vRanger).
Proactive management of incidents and recoveries of files and virtual machines for multiple clients.
Development of Python pipelines for extraction, processing, and visualization of backup and tape data for cycle optimization.
Standardization of technical documentation for backup monitoring in NetVault to improve the quality of SLAs.

items.title: BSc in Computer Science
description: Speaker at the 1st Student Engineering Congress (CEI 2024). Presented the first success case of agile methodologies (Scrum) implementation in the academic training at the Iquique Campus.
Teaching Assistant for Web Technologies, Advanced Programming, and Operations Research.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: If you want to build, optimize, or just do something together, hit me up. I would appreciate it if it wasn't to offer me a phone plan switch.
